bar: A future vector or hybrid substrate must match the checked-only BM25 contract and improve semantic recall before it replaces the packaged baseline.

documents.body: Randomized trial of mobile reminders improved medication adherence in chronic care.
Interview study: patients described alarm fatigue, patient burden, and notification overload.
Citation neighborhood links adherence interventions to implementation barriers and follow-up attrition.

verdict.reason: The packaged product uses deterministic checked-only BM25 search. Semantic and hybrid retrieval remain future work until a local vector pipeline ships as product code.
